title: Luffy Takes Responsibility
description: On pages 7–10, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Big Mom, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Tamago. The central beat is luffy takes responsibility.
scene: The scene focuses on luffy takes responsibility, with Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Big Mom, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Tamago shaping the conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: He's like a pair of compasses...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Are you looking forward to them too...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Of course we are!! They're simply divine!!

dialogue.speaker: Tamago
dialogue.text: Whaaaa?! Please don't do that, Mama!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I just got back, boyoyoyoyoyoyoyoyoyo young!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Good, good... How did it go, Bobbin?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Perfect! It all went up in flames!!

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom
dialogue.text: YONKOU GREAT PIRATE "Big Mom" Charlotte Rinrin

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Bring me a den-den mushi at once!!!

summary: Luffy Takes Responsibility. This part advances the end of the Fish-Man Island conflict and the island’s attempt to move beyond inherited hatred.
